title: schizachyrium scoparium var. polycladum
intro: Schizachyrium scoparium var. polycladum, also known as Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Schizachyrium scoparium var. polycladum is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
